tagline: Take a vacation in your own backyard.

hero.headline:
Three Generations of Backyard
Vacations
hero.subheadline: For over 60 years, Staten Island families have trusted Holly Hill Pool & Patio for pools, chemicals, repairs, and everything in between. We sell fun — guaranteed.

services.label: Our Products & Services
services.headline: Your One-Stop Shop for<br class="hidden md:block"> Backyard Living
services.subtitle: From swimming pools and water chemistry to sheds, awnings, and propane — Holly Hill has everything you need to enjoy your outdoor space all season long.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Above-ground and in-ground pools from Sharkline and EZ Panel. Navigator, Escalade, Summerfield, and S models sized to fit any Staten Island backyard.

cards.title: Pool Chemicals & Water Testing
cards.description: BioGuard chemical programs with step-by-step instructions, plus FREE computerized water testing that gives you a personalized treatment plan every visit.

cards.title: Repair & Service Center
cards.description: Expert repairs for filters, motors, automatic vacuums, and all pool equipment. Experienced technicians who diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Pool Accessories & Equipment
cards.description: Filters, ladders, steps, liners, heaters, automatic vacuums, and safety covers — everything to keep your pool running smoothly and safely.

cards.title: Storage Sheds & Pool Houses
cards.description: Custom sheds from New England, Garden Cottage, and Traditional Vinyl. Plus chicken coops and poolside structures from Limerick, Cantania, and Breakaway.

cards.title: Retractable Awnings
cards.description: Premium Aristocrat and Sunsetter retractable awnings that provide shade and comfort for your patio, deck, or poolside living area.

steps.title: Visit or Call Us
steps.description: Stop by our Staten Island showroom or give us a call. Bring a water sample for a free computerized test and tell us about your backyard plans.

steps.title: Get Expert Guidance
steps.description: Our knowledgeable staff will walk you through options, answer every question honestly, and never push products you don't need. Three generations of expertise at your service.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: With the right pool, chemicals, and equipment, your backyard becomes a vacation destination. We stay with you season after season for testing, service, and supplies.

about.label: Why Staten Island Trusts Us
about.headline: Family Owned for 60+ Years — Three Generations of Pool Expertise
about.description: Since 1965, the Holly Hill family has been helping Staten Island homeowners turn their backyards into vacation destinations. Three generations later, we still believe in honest advice, fair pricing, and never selling you something you don't need. As a BioGuard Platinum Dealer, we carry only the best pool chemicals and back every recommendation with free computerized water testing.

features.title: Free Computerized Water Testing
features.description: Bring in a water sample anytime and our system delivers precise results with a personalized treatment plan — completely free, every visit.

features.title: Honest Advice, No Pressure
features.description: Our staff is known for straightforward guidance. We answer questions, explain options, and never push products you don't need.

features.title: One-Stop Backyard Shop
features.description: Pools, chemicals, sheds, awnings, repairs, propane — everything for your outdoor space under one roof. No running around town.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing From People You Trust.
pricing.subtitle: Visit our showroom for current pricing on pools, chemicals, equipment, and services. No hidden fees — what we quote is what you pay.

guarantee.headline: Our "We Sell Fun" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any product or service, come talk to us. We've built our reputation over 60 years on making things right — and we're not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy, it's a family tradition.

faqs.question: Do you install both above-ground and in-ground pools?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry a full selection of above-ground and in-ground swimming pools from trusted brands like Sharkline and EZ Panel. Visit our showroom to see models and discuss which option fits your yard, budget, and lifestyle.

faqs.question: How does the free water testing work?
faqs.answer: Just bring in a water sample anytime we're open. Our computerized system analyzes it in minutes and prints out a detailed treatment plan with step-by-step instructions. It's completely free, and we never pressure you to buy anything.

faqs.question: What brands of pool chemicals do you carry?
faqs.answer: As a BioGuard Platinum Dealer, we carry the full BioGuard line along with other trusted chemical brands. We offer multiple maintenance programs so you can choose the one that fits your pool and your budget.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our service center handles repairs for filters, motors, automatic vacuums, and other pool equipment. Our experienced technicians diagnose the problem and get you back up and running quickly.

faqs.question: Do you sell anything besides pool products?
faqs.answer: We do! Holly Hill is a full backyard destination. We carry storage sheds, pool houses, retractable awnings from Aristocrat and Sunsetter, and even BBQ propane tank exchanges. Come see everything in our showroom.

testimonials.name: Zoey
testimonials.text: They are truly amazing to deal with and very professional. Will continue to use them for all services.

testimonials.name: John B.
testimonials.text: Holly Hill surpasses all other pool stores in customer service. Staff is very knowledgeable and friendly.

testimonials.name: Danielle
testimonials.text: Customer service unmatched. Every interaction is pleasant. Really can't say enough good things about Holly Hill.

contact.headline:
Ready to Enjoy Your
Backyard This Season?
contact.subtitle: Stop by our Staten Island showroom, call us, or send a message. We're here to help with pools, chemicals, sheds, awnings, and everything in between.
benefits: Expert advice from 60+ years of experience
